commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the follow-mode journal latch in the logs CLI and adds regression tests for retrying Gateway `logs.tail` after temporary systemd journal fallback.

PR surface: Source -24, Tests +142. Total +118 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current `main` and `v2026.5.27` set `forceJournal` after a journal payload and then bypass `logs.tail`. I did not run a live Linux/systemd reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor needs real Linux/systemd logs-follow proof and maintainer acceptance of the source-switch compatibility behavior; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue.

target.title: fix(cli): retry logs.tail after journal fallback in logs follow
